name: Soda Bread (Quick) (Callery)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients.
2. Add enough buttermilk to make a soft dough.
3. Knead the dough lightly.
4. Form a round loaf about as thick as your fist.
5. Place it on a lightly-floured baking sheet and cut a cross in the top with a floured knife.
6. Bake near the top of a preheated 450°F oven for 30-45 minutes.
(Note: The first recipe is adapted from one I found years ago in the newspaper. The second recipe is from "A Little Irish Cookbook" by John Murphy Chronicle Books, 1986.)
